$comment: Cross-implementation interop vector for the pairing identity signatures (pairing.v1): keyId, idSig, and PoP. cqdx/panino(TS)/pancetta(Rust) MUST reproduce keyId + both signed payloads (…SignedPayloadHex) byte-for-byte and verify idSig/pop over them with identityPublicKeyRaw. Generated by the cqdx PR #127 reference oracle (packages/shared/src/device-crypto.ts + tools/reference-agent). Adopt + drift-guard exactly like noise-ik.vectors.v1 and tx-arm-grant.vectors.v1.
suite: pairing identity signatures (keyId / idSig / PoP, Ed25519 + domain separation)
domainSeparation: domainSeparate(tag, payload) = utf8(tag) ‖ 0x00 ‖ payload. Tags: idSig = "cqdx-pair-idsig-v1", PoP = "cqdx-pair-challenge-v1".
keyIdDerivation: keyId = unpadded-base64url( SHA-256( SPKI-DER ) ) where SPKI-DER = 302a300506032b6570032100 ‖ 32-byte raw Ed25519 identity public key.

conventions.idSig: Ed25519 over domainSeparate("cqdx-pair-idsig-v1", agreementPublicKeyRaw) — the signed payload is the RAW 32-byte X25519 agreement public key (NOT its base64url string).
conventions.pop: Ed25519 over domainSeparate("cqdx-pair-challenge-v1", utf8(challengeNonceB64u)) — the signed payload is the UTF-8 bytes of the base64url nonce STRING (NOT the decoded nonce bytes). This mirrors the server verify path (registry.ts) and pairing.v1's PoP description.
conventions.encoding: All key/signature fields are unpadded base64url; *Hex fields are lowercase hex of the exact bytes hashed/signed, provided so other impls can diff the intermediate.

sanityAnchor: For an Ed25519 private seed of 32×0x01, keyId == _RENMB0vB33hQUuPmfRBsUA_qyB7IFL70sBl5O6OfcI (matches panino's known-answer test).

conformance.cqdx: PASS (generated 2026-07-01 by the PR #127 reference oracle: deriveKeyId + domainSeparate from packages/shared/src/device-crypto.ts; idSig via generateAgentIdentity's signer; PoP via buildCompletePayload; keyId anchor matches; idSig + PoP self-verify under verifyEd25519). Will land as a drift-guarded conformance test in @cqdx/shared.
conformance.panino: PASS - panino @noble (TS) reproduces keyId (SPKI 302a300506032b6570032100 || rawpub, SHA-256, unpadded b64url == _RENMB0vB33hQUuPmfRBsUA_qyB7IFL70sBl5O6OfcI), idSig (domainSeparate over the RAW 32-byte agreement key), and PoP (domainSeparate over utf8 of the base64url nonce STRING) byte-for-byte, and verifies idSig/PoP under identityPublicKeyRaw. Verified 2026-07-01; drift-guarded conformance test lands in panino src/crypto/pairing-sig.vectors.test.ts (pairing-client branch).
conformance.pancetta: PASS - Rust (ed25519-dalek 2 + sha2) reproduces byte-for-byte: identity pubkey from the 0x01x32 seed; keyId == _RENMB0vB33hQUuPmfRBsUA_qyB7IFL70sBl5O6OfcI (SPKI 302a300506032b6570032100 || rawpub, SHA-256, unpadded b64url); idSig signedPayloadHex (dsep over the RAW 32-byte agreement key) + PoP signedPayloadHex (dsep over utf8 of the base64url nonce STRING) both match, and idSig/PoP verify under identityPublicKeyRaw. Verified 2026-07-01; the same conventions ship in pancetta-agent/src/keys.rs (P3.1) and will land as a drift-guarded test alongside the noise + txArm vectors.
